name: @smithy-hono/client-web
description: Browser auth helper for smithy-hono services. Drives the security-core OIDC cookie-session flow (login redirect, callback exchange, CSRF synchronizer token, logout) from a single-page app and wires it into the GENERATED typed client via its `fetch`/`headers` injection points — `credentials: 'include'` plus the in-memory CSRF token, with automatic refresh-and-retry on token rotation. Web-standard only (ARCH-01): fetch / URL / crypto-free; no `hono`, no `node:*`, no SDK.
